156 P3G P3G_NR_DRESS_GROOM 39g(P3g)Nursing Rehab: Dressing or Grooming CHAR 1 Indicates the extent to which the patient participated in activities to improve or maintain his self-performance in dressing and undressing, bathing, and washing, and performing other personal hygiene tasks.
